name: judaica-store
description: A full-stack e-commerce platform for a Judaica and sacred-objects store, built with React + Vite and a Node/Express/MongoDB backend, fully localized in Hebrew (RTL). Features product variants with independent pricing, an admin panel, customer reviews, smart Hebrew-aware search and more.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
